serviceNotes.engine oil: EU: Subaru Europe specifies servicing every 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever comes first) for European cars. MY22+ BRZ/WRX Warranty and Service Handbook (Subaru Australia) lists engine oil and filter replace (R) at each A–H service on the same 15,000 km / 12 month rhythm.
serviceNotes.interior ventilation filter: MY22+ BRZ/WRX handbook: interior ventilation filter inspect (I) each A–H service. This entry uses 30,000 km / 24 months as replacement cadence between inspections under normal European driving.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: MY22+ handbook table: air cleaner I I R I I R I I across A–H (first replace at 45,000 km / 36 months in the 120,000 km cycle).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: MY22+ BRZ/WRX maintenance table: spark plugs R on the published BRZ row; 120,000 km / 120 months matches the long-life iridium cycle after which the sequence repeats.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Handbook brake fluid I R I R on the A–H grid with 15,000 km / 12 month services ≈ replace every 24 months (time-only tracking: 24 months).
serviceNotes.inspect disc brake pads: Handbook: disc brake pads and discs I each scheduled service under normal driving.
serviceNotes.rear differential oil: Handbook: rear differential oil (Subaru BRZ only) I R I R across A–H — replace every 30,000 km / 24 months.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: Handbook: automatic transmission fluid (Subaru BRZ only) replace (R) at E service (75,000 km / 60 months); inspect at other listed services.
serviceNotes.coolant: Handbook: coolant R at H service (120,000 km / 96 months), Subaru Genuine Long Life coolant only; other intervals inspect (I).
serviceNotes.manual transmission oil: Handbook: manual transmission oil I each A–H service. Preventive exchange at 120,000 km / 120 months if oil degrades or after track use.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever comes first). https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — BRZ/WRX: engine oil & filter R each scheduled service on that interval.
serviceSources.interior ventilation filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: itemised work in owner’s manual / repairer. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — interior ventilation filter I each A–H; 30,000 km / 24 months replacement between inspections.
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU service rhythm 15,000 km / 12 months. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — air cleaner element I I R I I R I I across A–H.
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU baseline schedule; detailed replace points in market manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — MY22+ BRZ row: spark plugs R at 120,000 km / 120 months in repeating cycle.
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: follow authorised repairer schedule. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — brake fluid I R I R (24 months with 15,000 km annual rhythm).
serviceSources.inspect disc brake pads: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: brake checks at each scheduled service. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — disc brake pads and discs I each service.
serviceSources.rear differential oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: differential service per owner’s manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — rear differential oil (BRZ only) I R I R.
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: transmission maintenance per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — ATF (BRZ only) R at E service (75,000 km / 60 months).
serviceSources.coolant: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: coolant service per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — coolant R at H (120,000 km / 96 months), Subaru Genuine Longlife coolant.
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: gearbox oil per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — manual transmission oil I each service; preventive exchange 120,000 km / 120 months when fluid condition warrants (specialist practice for track use).
